scenario_assessments.reasoning: OS Windows Server 2019 is current; no immediate patch needed.
Running on Windows Server 2019; migrating to standard Linux would reduce licensing costs.
Application is containerized; ARM CPU adoption is feasible with image rebuilds.
Uses application server Microsoft IIS 10.0; replacement/upgrade may be beneficial.
Application can be migrated to cloud (lift & shift).
Refactoring would improve maintainability and reduce technical debt.
Database PostgreSQL 15 is current; no immediate upgrade needed.
Already using open source or managed database (PostgreSQL 15).
All components are current; no immediate updates needed.
